## What & why

<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (agent / skill / provider / tool / core)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] Tests added/updated for behavior changes (offline & deterministic)
- [ ] No secrets committed; docs updated if needed
